race.comment: NOR NOR WEST (5) is back after an 18-week spell. Won a BM66 over this distance at Dubbo last time in work. A drying track certainly helps the cause. Went well in a recent trial at this track and at odds he is worth the gamble first-up. The unbeaten SOBEK (7) returned from a five-month spell with a tidy win over 900m here three weeks ago. Promising three-year-old who is untapped and probably heading for better races than this. Definite threat. BULLION HUNTER (3) scored a game win in a similar race to this at Muswellbrook three runs ago. Two subsequent runs over longer trips have been less impressive. Needs it dry so monitor track conditions as the day progresses. SINGING STAR (6) produced a decent effort to finish fourth over this trip at the Kensington track last time. Hasn't won for a while but loves the soft going so keep her safe. LISTINS LASS (9) resumes. Will be better for the run but blinkers on raises interest.
